request_params.name: isolatedPositionId
request_params.description: Isolated position ID. Obtain via Get Single Position .

request_params.name: amount
request_params.description: Margin amount to adjust. Must be greater than 0.

request_params.name: type
request_params.description: Adjustment direction. 1 = increase isolated margin; 2 = decrease isolated margin.

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair

request_params.name: marginType
request_params.description: Margin mode. Supported values: CROSSED (cross margin), ISOLATED (isolated margin).

request_params.name: separatedType
request_params.description: Position mode. COMBINED keeps both long and short in one position. SEPARATED splits positions.

response_params.name: dualSidePosition
response_params.description: Whether dual-side position mode is enabled true: Can hold both long and short positions simultaneously false: One-way position mode

response_params.name: side
response_params.description: Position direction such as LONG or SHORT

response_params.name: marginType
response_params.description: Margin mode of current position CROSSED: Cross Mode ISOLATED: Isolated Mode

response_params.name: separatedMode
response_params.description: Current position's separated mode COMBINED: Combined mode SEPARATED: Separated mode

response_params.name: separatedOpenOrderId
response_params.description: Opening order ID of separated position

response_params.name: isAutoAppendIsolatedMargin
response_params.description: Whether the auto-adding of funds for the isolated margin is enabled (only for isolated mode)

response_params.name: cumOpenFee
response_params.description: Accumulated fees paid for opened positions

response_params.name: cumCloseFee
response_params.description: Accumulated fees paid for closing positions

response_params.name: createdMatchSequenceId
response_params.description: Matching engine sequence ID at creation

response_params.name: updatedMatchSequenceId
response_params.description: Matching engine sequence ID at last update

response_params.name: liquidatePrice
response_params.description: Estimated liquidation price If the value = 0, it means the position is at low risk and there is no liquidation price at this time

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair

request_params.name: asset
request_params.description: Asset name

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair

request_params.name: incomeType
request_params.description: Business type deposit : Deposit withdraw : Withdrawal transfer_in : Transfer between different accounts (in) transfer_out : Transfer between different accounts (out) margin_move_in : Collateral transferred within the same account due to opening/closing positions, manual/auto addition margin_move_out : Collateral transferred out within the same account due to opening/closing positions, manual/auto addition position_open_long : Collateral change from opening long positions (buying decreases collateral) position_open_short : Collateral change from opening short positions (selling increases collateral) position_close_long : Collateral change from closing long positions (selling increases collateral) position_close_short : Collateral change from closing short positions (buying decreases collateral) position_funding : Collateral change from position funding fee settlement order_fill_fee_income : Order fill fee income (specific to fee account) order_liquidate_fee_income : Order liquidation fee income (specific to fee account) start_liquidate : Start liquidation finish_liquidate : Finish liquidation order_fix_margin_amount : Compensation for liquidation loss tracking_follow_pay : Copy trading payment, pre-deducted from followers after position closing if profitable tracking_system_pre_receive : Pre-received commission, commission system account receives pre-deducted amount from followers tracking_follow_back : Copy trading commission refund tracking_trader_income : Lead trader income tracking_third_party_share : Profit sharing (shared by lead trader with others)

request_params.name: startTime
request_params.description: Start timestamp Unit: milliseconds. If only endTime is provided, the system defaults startTime to 30 days before endTime (not earlier than current time).

request_params.name: endTime
request_params.description: End timestamp Unit: milliseconds. If only startTime is provided, endTime defaults to the current time. When both are provided, the range must not exceed 100 days.

request_params.name: limit
request_params.description: Return record limit, default: 20 Minimum: 1 Maximum: 100

response_params.name: hasNextPage
response_params.description: Whether there is a next page

response_params.name: > transferReason
response_params.description: Transfer Reason UNKNOWN_TRANSFER_REASON: Unknown transfer reason USER_TRANSFER: User manual transfer INCREASE_CONTRACT_CASH_GIFT: Increase contract cash gift REDUCE_CONTRACT_CASH_GIFT: Reduce contract cash gift REFUND_WXB_DISCOUNT_FEE: Refund WXB discount fee

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair

request_params.description: Trading pair If not provided, all will be returned by default

response_params.description: Margin mode CROSSED: Cross Mode ISOLATED: Isolated Mode

response_params.name: separatedType
response_params.description: Position segregation mode COMBINED: Combined mode SEPARATED: Separated mode

request_params.name: autoAppendMargin
request_params.description: Whether to enable automatic isolated margin top-up

request_params.name: isolatedShortLeverage
request_params.description: Isolated short leverage. Required when updating the isolated short position.

response_params.name: marginType
response_params.description: Applied margin mode CROSSED or ISOLATED

request_params.description: Client order ID, 1-36 characters. Required when orderId is not provided.

request_params.description: Up to 10 order IDs to cancel. Required when origClientOrderIdList is empty.

request_params.description: Up to 10 client order IDs. Each must match ^[\\.A-Z\:/a-z0-9_-]{1,36}$ . Required when orderIdList is empty.

request_params.description: End time (ms). Must be â¥ startTime .

request_params.name: limit
request_params.description: Page size, 1-100. Default 100.

response_params.name: algoType
response_params.description: Conditional order category. Currently only CONDITIONAL is returned.

response_params.name: orderType
response_params.description: Triggered order type. Values: STOP , TAKE_PROFIT , STOP_MARKET , TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET , TRAILING_STOP_MARKET .

response_params.name: timeInForce
response_params.description: Time-in-force for the triggered order. Values: GTC , IOC , FOK , POST_ONLY .

response_params.name: algoStatus
response_params.description: Conditional order status. Values: NEW , PENDING , UNTRIGGERED , FILLED , CANCELED , CANCELING .

response_params.name: actualOrderId
response_params.description: ID of the triggered active order (if any).

response_params.name: price
response_params.description: Execution price configured for the triggered order.

response_params.name: tpOrderType
response_params.description: Take-profit trigger price source. Values: CONTRACT_PRICE , MARK_PRICE .

response_params.name: workingType
response_params.description: Trigger price source. Values: CONTRACT_PRICE , MARK_PRICE .

response_params.name: closePosition
response_params.description: Whether the triggered order will close the entire position.

response_params.name: reduceOnly
response_params.description: Whether the triggered order is reduce-only.

response_params.name: triggerTime
response_params.description: Trigger time (ms). Returns 0 if the order has not been triggered.

request_params.name: triggerPrice
request_params.description: New trigger price (> 0).

request_params.name: executePrice
request_params.description: New execution price. Set to 0 or omit to switch to market execution.

request_params.name: triggerPriceType
request_params.description: Trigger price source. CONTRACT_PRICE or MARK_PRICE . Default CONTRACT_PRICE .

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair, for example BTCUSDT .

request_params.name: side
request_params.description: Order side. Supported values: BUY , SELL .

request_params.name: positionSide
request_params.description: Position side. Supported values: LONG , SHORT .

request_params.name: type
request_params.description: Order type. Supported values: LIMIT , MARKET .

request_params.name: timeInForce
request_params.description: Time-in-force policy. Required when type = LIMIT . Supported values: GTC , IOC , FOK .

request_params.name: quantity
request_params.description: Order quantity. Must be greater than 0.

request_params.name: price
request_params.description: Limit price. Required when type = LIMIT .

request_params.name: newClientOrderId
request_params.description: Client order identifier (1-36 characters, pattern ^[\\.A-Z\:/a-z0-9_-]{1,36}$ ).

request_params.name: tpTriggerPrice
request_params.description: Optional take-profit trigger price.

request_params.name: slTriggerPrice
request_params.description: Optional stop-loss trigger price.

request_params.name: TpWorkingType
request_params.description: Take-profit trigger price source. Supported values: CONTRACT_PRICE , MARK_PRICE . Default CONTRACT_PRICE .

request_params.name: SlWorkingType
request_params.description: Stop-loss trigger price source. Supported values: CONTRACT_PRICE , MARK_PRICE . Default CONTRACT_PRICE .

response_params.name: orderId
response_params.description: Order ID assigned by the system.

response_params.name: success
response_params.description: Whether the order request was accepted.

response_params.name: errorCode
response_params.description: Error code when success = false ; otherwise empty.

response_params.name: errorMessage
response_params.description: Error message when success = false ; otherwise empty.

request_params.name: batchOrders
request_params.description: Up to 10 orders per request. Each element uses the same fields as Place Order (TRADE) .

request_params.description: Order side. Values: BUY , SELL .

request_params.name: positionSide
request_params.description: Position side. Values: LONG , SHORT .

request_params.name: type
request_params.description: Conditional order type. Values: STOP , TAKE_PROFIT , STOP_MARKET , TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET .

request_params.name: quantity
request_params.description: Order quantity. Must be > 0.

request_params.description: Execution price. Required when type is STOP or TAKE_PROFIT .

request_params.name: triggerPrice

request_params.description: Client-defined identifier (1-36 characters, pattern ^[\\.A-Z\:/a-z0-9_-]{1,36}$ ).

request_params.name: presetTakeProfitPrice
request_params.description: Optional take-profit trigger price.

request_params.name: presetStopLossPrice
request_params.description: Optional stop-loss trigger price.

request_params.name: TpWorkingType
request_params.description: Take-profit trigger type: CONTRACT_PRICE or MARK_PRICE . Default CONTRACT_PRICE .

request_params.name: SlWorkingType
request_params.description: Stop-loss trigger type: CONTRACT_PRICE or MARK_PRICE . Default CONTRACT_PRICE .

request_params.name: symbol
request_params.description: Trading pair.

request_params.name: clientAlgoId
request_params.description: Client-defined identifier (1-36 characters, pattern ^[\\.A-Z\:/a-z0-9_-]{1,36}$ ).

request_params.name: planType
request_params.description: Plan type. Values: TAKE_PROFIT , STOP_LOSS .

request_params.description: Trigger price (> 0).

request_params.name: executePrice
request_params.description: Execution price. Set to 0 or omit for market execution.

request_params.description: Quantity to execute.

request_params.name: positionSide
request_params.description: Position side ( LONG , SHORT ).

request_params.description: Trigger source. CONTRACT_PRICE or MARK_PRICE . Default CONTRACT_PRICE .
